hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
hero.valueProposition: 3+ years of experience building scalable web applications with React, Node.js and AWS. Specialized in agile environments and user-centered solutions development.

learning.title: Continuous Learning
learning.description: Technology evolves constantly, and so do I. I am currently deepening my knowledge in microservices, refining my advanced testing skills, exploring Angular, and preparing for the MCP certification.

about.collaborationTitle2: Would you like to work with me?
about.collaborationDescription2: I'm always open to new challenges and collaboration opportunities. If you have an interesting project or just want to chat about technology, don't hesitate to contact me.

myJourney.title: My Journey
myJourney.paragraph1: My passion for technology began when I created my first website at 15 years old. Since then, I've been obsessed with writing clean and efficient code.
myJourney.paragraph2: Over the years, I've worked on diverse projects, from startups to established companies, always focusing on creating solutions that make a difference.

beyondCode.description: When I'm not coding, you'll find me:

roles.title: Roles and Evolution
roles.paragraph1: I've had the privilege of working in various roles, from Frontend Developer to Software Architect.
roles.paragraph2: Each role has taught me something valuable and helped me grow as a professional and as a person.

additionalInfo.philosophyDetail: Clean code and accessibility aren't optional, they're essential.
